</details>

 What does your project add? 
My project adds an fps modpack that uses the best fps mods that gives you the best framrate for low-end devices! 

### What features does it have?
**Huuuge** fps optimization to the max! It adds sodium and dynamic fps and complementary shaders and a-lot more.

###   Why would a user want to download it?
It's good to download because it has a lot of mods and you can should get up to 400 fps on high devices and 100-200 fps on low end. Its also good for 1.21 mods like the mellow or redhat shaders...
ohh umm plz use my modpack in a youtube video if someone can.
